description: Log of all critical alerts fired by WF5. Retention: Indefinite.

columns.name: conversation_id
columns.note: Intercom conversation ID that triggered the alert

columns.name: notified_to
columns.note: Comma-separated list of who was notified (Slack/email)

columns.name: responded
columns.note: TRUE if a stakeholder acknowledged the alert

columns.name: response_time
columns.note: How long until first response (manually filled)
